title: Mismatch pattern database
description: Search live objdiff mismatch summaries plus generated local indexes of known assembly mismatch patterns and source-shape fixes.
status_message: Live runner v1: objdiff mismatch evidence is generated locally by toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/research/mismatch_db/runners/analyze_objdiff_mismatches.py.
limitations: The live runner performs a narrow representative objdiff diff; broaden --unit/--symbol targets for specific files.
Generated lookup indexes remain supplemental and should be verified against local objdiff output.

usage.agent_guidance: Use after seeing an objdiff/checkdiff symptom to find known matching tactics and cautions.
